attributes.closes_gap: PARTIAL - infrastructure + raw data available; needs HPC run + external clinical map
attributes.blocker: Full BAM processing = HPC + Europe VM (measured 1.1MB/s here -> 1.8-5.3 days DL alone). Clinical labels (PFI/platinum status) require BriTROC-1 supplement mapping BAM->patient->outcome (NOT in EGA dataset).

attributes.role: TEST (external replication of SAE-style serial-marker leakage)

attributes.blocker: PDS is pan-cancer clinical-trial data, not the exact SAE ovarian cohort; serves as external stress-test, not a like-for-like restore of Tier3.
